Soul Surfer (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $43,853,424Details
International Box Office $3,282,065
Worldwide Box Office $47,135,489
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $17,028,629
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,297,795
Total $21,326,424
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Bethany was born to surf. A natural talent who took to the waves at a young age, she was leading an idyllic life on Kauai, participating in national surf competitions with her best friend Alana (Lorraine Nicholson), when everything changed. On Halloween morning, a 14-foot tiger shark came out of nowhere and seemed to shatter all her dreams. Soul Surfer reveals Bethany's fight to recover from her ordeal and how she grappled with the question of her future. Strengthened by the love of her parents, Tom and Cheri, and supported by her youth group leader Sara, Bethany refuses to give in or give up, and begins a bold return to the water.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,601,862 (24.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,214 opening theaters/2,240 max. theaters, 6.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $66,139,589

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 8th, 2011 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: April 20th, 2012 (Wide) (Spain)
June 9th, 2012 (Wide) (Japan)
April 8th, 2021 (Limited) (Australia)
May 25th, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: August 2nd, 2011 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for an intense accident sequence and some thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2143, 10/20/2010)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Geographical setting: Hawaii
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Biography, Comeback, Medical and Hospitals, Religious, Surfing
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Tri-Star Pictures, FilmDistrict, Enticing Entertainment, Island Film Group, Affirm Films, Brookwell McNamara Entertainment, Life's a Beach Entertainment, Mandalay Vision
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Bethany was born to surf. A natural talent who took to the waves at a young age, she was leading an idyllic life on Kauai, participating in national surf competitions with her best friend Alana (Lorraine Nicholson), when everything changed. On Halloween morning, a 14-foot tiger shark came out of nowhere and seemed to shatter all her dreams. Soul Surfer reveals Bethany's fight to recover from her ordeal and how she grappled with the question of her future. Strengthened by the love of her parents, Tom and Cheri, and supported by her youth group leader Sara, Bethany refuses to give in or give up, and begins a bold return to the water.
